description: §48.3.2 clean neg — a pure `fn build(x)` that computes a value (`x * 2`) with no DOM access SHALL NOT fire E-FN-002. Confirms the DOM-mutation walker does not false-fire on ordinary pure arithmetic. `notCodes` asserts E-FN-002 stays silent.
rationale: §48.3.2 fires only on DOM-node mutation/creation calls (`document.*`, `.appendChild`, `.innerHTML`, …). A `fn` body that only computes a value of its inputs touches no DOM and is silent.
